channel.title: CyberNetSec - Data Breach
channel.description: Latest data breach threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: HealthNet Insurance Breach Exposes Sensitive Health Data of 11 Million Patients via Misconfigured AWS S3 Bucket
item.description:
HealthNet Insurance, a major US health provider, has disclosed a data breach that exposed the personal and medical information of 11 million individuals. The breach, discovered on June 15, 2026, originated from a misconfigured Amazon Web Services (AWS) S3 bucket that contained access keys to other s...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Cloud Security, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: EDPB Adopts Common Template for GDPR Data Breach Notifications
item.description:
The European Data Protection Board (EDPB) has adopted a common, standardized template for organizations to use when notifying supervisory authorities of a personal data breach under the GDPR. This initiative aims to simplify the compliance process and harmonize the currently fragmented reporting req...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: AssuranceAmerica Data Breach Impacts Over 1.1 Million, Exposing SSNs and Driver's Licenses
item.description:
AssuranceAmerica Managing General Agency, LLC has disclosed a major data breach affecting over 1.1 million individuals. The incident, which occurred in March 2026, stemmed from a targeted attack on an employee. The unauthorized access led to the theft of a vast amount of sensitive policyholder data,...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Phishing, Cyberattack

Read Full Article →

item.title: Tata Electronics Confirms Cyberattack; Hackers Claim Leak of Apple and Tesla Data
item.description:
Indian manufacturing giant Tata Electronics, a key supplier for Apple, has confirmed it sustained a cyberattack. The admission follows claims by a hacking group called 'World Leaks' that it stole and published over 630GB of sensitive data. The leaked files allegedly include intellectual property, te...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Supply Chain Attack, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: Polymarket Hit by $3.1M Supply Chain Attack; Malicious JavaScript Siphons User Funds
item.description:
The cryptocurrency prediction platform Polymarket has confirmed a loss of approximately $3.1 million due to a frontend supply chain attack. First reported on June 26, 2026, the incident occurred when attackers compromised an unnamed third-party software dependency and injected malicious JavaScript i...

Severity: High

Categories: Supply Chain Attack, Cyberattack, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: New 'Icarus' Extortion Group Hits Klue, Steals Customer Salesforce Data via OAuth Attack
item.description:
The competitive intelligence platform Klue has confirmed a security breach where attackers gained unauthorized access to its customers' connected Salesforce environments. A new extortion group named 'Icarus' has claimed responsibility. The attack vector involved the theft and abuse of OAuth tokens, ...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Cloud Security

Read Full Article →

item.title: Malaysian Government Websites Hacked via Critical Joomla Flaw
item.description:
Malaysia's National Cyber Security Agency (Nacsa) has issued an alert after multiple government websites, including the Ministry of Health's, were compromised through a critical vulnerability in a Joomla CMS extension. The flaw allows for pre-authentication remote code execution (RCE), enabling atta...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Cyberattack, Vulnerability, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: German Defense Firm Atlas Elektronik Breached by 'TheGentlemen' Group
item.description:
Atlas Elektronik GmbH, a leading German provider of defense and maritime technology, has been listed as a victim by the threat actor group 'TheGentlemen.' The breach, reported on June 26, 2026, represents a significant cyberattack on a critical defense contractor, raising concerns about the potentia...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: INC_RANSOM Hits Indian Agro-Tech Firm GSP Crop Science in Ransomware Attack
item.description:
GSP Crop Science Limited, an agricultural technology company based in India, has fallen victim to a ransomware attack by the 'INC_RANSOM' group. The breach, reported on June 26, 2026, threatens a key player in India's agricultural sector. INC_RANSOM is known for its double-extortion tactics, where i...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Data Breach, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: Spanish Construction Giant Grupo Fonsán Hit by 'Booba' Threat Group
item.description:
Grupo Fonsán, a major construction and engineering holding group based in Spain, has been breached by a threat actor group known as 'Booba.' The security incident, reported on June 26, 2026, marks another significant attack on Spain's critical industrial sectors. The breach could expose sensitive da...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →
